events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need reason. Scenario: commercial construction, form build & bracing, observed condition: inadequate bracing/kickers for pour pressure, work in-progress. Reference ACI 347. Need identify hazards, severity, immediate controls. Decision must be fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk high or critical? Inadequate bracing for pour pressure can cause form blowout, collapse, falling concrete, injuries/fatality. Severity critical maybe. Work_stage in-progress. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete estimate maybe 60? value not asked 0. confidence high 0.95. event_time etc default 0. order empty. workable empty. findings: inadequate bracing/kickers unable to resist hydrostatic/concrete pour pressures; potential form blowout/collapse; missing/insufficient kickers, walers, ties per ACI 347. actions: stop pour; install adequate kickers/bracing/walers/ties per engineer/formwork design; inspect by competent person; resubmit/review formwork drawings; do not pour until corrected and signed off. rationale. references ACI 347, maybe OSHA 1926.703. Need only JSON. Ensure valid JSON.

  "findings": [
    "Inadequate bracing/kickers for anticipated concrete pour pressure",
    "Formwork assembly cannot safely resist hydrostatic/lateral loads",
    "Non-compliant with ACI 347 formwork design and bracing requirements",
    "Imminent risk of form blowout, collapse, or falling concrete during placement"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt concrete placement immediately in affected area",
    "Install additional kickers, braces, walers, and ties per the approved formwork design",
    "Have a competent person/engineer inspect and approve the corrected bracing before resuming",
    "Update/re-submit formwork drawings and calculations if design changes are required",
    "Brief crew on revised bracing plan and verify all hardware is installed and tightened"
  ],
  "rationale": "Inadequate bracing/kickers for pour pressure creates an imminent collapse hazard. ACI 347 requires formwork to be designed and braced to safely support all applied loads, including lateral concrete pressure. The observed condition is defective and non-compliant, so the work must fail and be corrected before any pour proceeds.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 347"
  ]
